title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Droom Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Droom Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Droom Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom Ventures Solutions:
Droom Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom Ventures Solutions!
